application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: 30 years (Relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Women and Physically challenged candidates)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: Up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Women and Physically challenged candidates.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.E./B.Tech. in Biotechnology/Industrial Biotechnology/Bioinformatics/ Biosciences and Bioengineering/ in related fields AND M.E./M.Tech./M.S. (by Research)/M.S.* (from abroad in Two year program only) Biotechnology/Industrial Biotechnology/Bioinformatics/Biosciences and Bioengineering/ in related fields with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category and minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA at both UG and PG for SC/ST/PwD category. B.E./B.Tech. in Biotechnology/Industrial Biotechnology/Bioinformatics/ Biosciences and Bioengineering/ in related fields with Valid GATE score and at least CGPA of 7.0/10 or 65% of marks under GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category and at least CGPA of 6.5/10 or 60% for candidates under SC/ST/PwD category. M.Sc. in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Botany/Zoology/ Bioinformatics/Life Sciences/in related fields AND M.Tech. in Biotechnology/Industrial Biotechnology/Bioinformatics/Biosciences and Bioengineering/in related fields with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category and minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA at both UG and PG for SC/ST/PwD category. M.Sc. in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Botany/Zoology/ Bioinformatics/Life Sciences/in related fields with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category and minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA at both UG and PG for SC/ST/PwD category. Experience: Prior knowledge and hands on experience with cyanobacteria, enzymes and basic bioinformatics tools / databases.

salary_details.details: Salary: Rs. 37,000/- pm Duration: two years

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Warangal is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech. or M.Sc./M.Tech. in relevant fields like Biotechnology, Bioinformatics, or Life Sciences, with specific aggregate marks or CGPA. A valid GATE score is also an option for B.E./B.Tech. graduates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month for a duration of two years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided. Candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/Women and Physically challenged categories can avail of an age relaxation of up to 5 years.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the JRF position at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: Applications can be submitted via email or online through a Google Form. You need to send your bio-data and scanned certificates as a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Warangal.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment for a research fellowship.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the NIT Warangal campus?
faq.answer: NIT Warangal is located in Warangal, Telangana, with the pincode 506004.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any application fee?
faq.answer: No, the official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.
